mapper.sql: lr.id, lr.late_return_id, lr.student_no, lr.late_time, lr.reason, lr.process_status, lr.process_result, lr.process_remark, lr.create_time, lr.update_time, s.name as student_name, s.college, s.dormitory
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no WHERE lr.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no WHERE lr.late_return_id = #{lateReturnId}

SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no ORDER BY lr.late_time DESC

SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no WHERE lr.student_no = #{studentNo} ORDER BY lr.late_time DESC

SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no WHERE lr.process_status = #{processStatus} ORDER BY lr.late_time DESC

SELECT
FROM late_return lr LEFT JOIN student s ON lr.student_no = s.student_no WHERE lr.process_result = #{processResult} ORDER BY lr.late_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO late_return ( late_return_id, student_no, late_time, reason, process_status, process_result, process_remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{lateReturnId}, #{studentNo}, #{lateTime}, #{reason}, #{processStatus}, #{processResult}, #{processRemark}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reason = VALUES(reason), process_status = VALUES(process_status), process_result = VALUES(process_result), process_remark = VALUES(process_remark), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE late_return SET process_status = #{processStatus}, process_result = #{processResult}, process_remark = #{processRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM late_return lr WHERE DATE(lr.late_time) = CURDATE()
